name: Atala
description: Atala is the first of the seven realms of Patala, the subterranean world in Hindu cosmology. It is described as a realm of immense beauty and opulence, surpassing even the heavens in its splendor. Ruled by the demon Bala, Atala is a place of immense wealth and magical power, inhabited by beings of great skill and artistry. The inhabitants, known as the 'Atalavasis', are skilled in magic, architecture, and various arts, creating a society of unparalleled sophistication. It is a realm of sensory pleasures and magical wonders, where the inhabitants live in luxury and indulge in various forms of entertainment. The soil of Atala is said to be of different colors, and the air is filled with enchanting fragrances. The rivers flow with nectar, and the trees bear fruits that grant immortality. However, beneath the surface of beauty and pleasure, Atala also represents the allure of material desires and the potential for entrapment in worldly attachments. It serves as a reminder of the importance of transcending the limitations of the physical world and seeking higher spiritual goals. The allure of Atala can distract from the pursuit of dharma and liberation, highlighting the need for discernment and self-control.
subtitle: First Realm of Patala, Subterranean Paradise

keyMyths.title: The Churning of the Ocean
keyMyths.description: During the Samudra Manthan, the churning of the ocean, various treasures and beings emerged from the depths, influencing the realms, including Patala and its inhabitants.

keyMyths.title: Vishnu's Descent
keyMyths.description: Vishnu, in his various avatars, has descended into Patala to restore balance and order, often interacting with the rulers and inhabitants of the realms.

sources.author: Veda Vyasa
sources.description: One of the major Puranas detailing Hindu cosmology and mythology.
sources.text: One of the major Puranas detailing Hindu cosmology and mythology.

sources.author: Unknown
sources.description: A Purana focused on the legends and stories of Vishnu and his avatars.
